# comfyui_jobs (Data Source)

Retrieves a list of jobs from the ComfyUI server with optional filtering.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of jobs to return.
- `offset` (Number) Number of jobs to skip (for pagination).
- `sort_by` (String) Sort jobs by field (e.g., create_time, priority).
- `sort_order` (String) Sort order (asc or desc).
- `statuses` (List of String) Filter jobs by status (e.g., pending, running, completed, error).
- `workflow_id` (String) Filter jobs by workflow ID.

### Read-Only

- `has_more` (Boolean) Indicates if there are more jobs available beyond the current result set.
- `id` (String) Identifier for this data source.
- `job_count` (Number) Number of jobs returned in this result set.
- `jobs` (Attributes List) List of jobs matching the filter criteria. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--jobs))

<a id="nestedatt--jobs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `jobs`

Read-Only:

- `create_time` (Number) Unix timestamp when the job was created.
- `execution_end_time` (Number) Unix timestamp when job execution ended.
- `execution_error_json` (String) JSON representation of execution error (if any).
- `execution_start_time` (Number) Unix timestamp when job execution started.
- `execution_status_json` (String) JSON representation of execution status.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the job.
- `outputs_count` (Number) Number of outputs produced by the job.
- `outputs_json` (String) JSON representation of job outputs.
- `preview_output_json` (String) JSON representation of preview output.
- `priority` (Number) The priority of the job.
- `status` (String) The current status of the job.
- `workflow_id` (String) The workflow ID associated with this job.
- `workflow_json` (String) JSON representation of the workflow.
